examples.title: Array Sum and Average
examples.description: Program to calculate sum and average of array elements
examples.explanation: Reads n elements into array, accumulates sum in loop, calculates average as sum/n. Uses float for sum and average to handle decimal results.

examples.title: Selection Sort Implementation
examples.description: Sorting array using selection sort algorithm
examples.code:
def selection_sort(arr):
    n = len(arr)
    for i in range(n-1):
        min_idx = i
        for j in range(i+1, n):
            if arr[j] < arr[min_idx]:
                min_idx = j
        arr[i], arr[min_idx] = arr[min_idx], arr[i]
    return arr

# Example usage
arr = [64, 25, 12, 22, 11]
print("Original:", arr)
sorted_arr = selection_sort(arr)
print("Sorted:", sorted_arr)
examples.explanation: Selection sort finds minimum element in unsorted portion and swaps it with first unsorted element. Repeated for all positions. In-place sorting with O(1) extra space.

examples.title: Binary Search Implementation
examples.explanation: Binary search divides search space in half each iteration. Requires sorted array. Time complexity O(log n) - halves search space each step.

examples.title: Linear Search Implementation
examples.explanation: Linear search checks each element sequentially from index 0 until target is found or array ends. Works on both sorted and unsorted arrays.
